nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as mere content generator without human input
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI as a brainstorming tool, when ideating content, normally to break through the writers block

nodes.label: AI as proofreading assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI for full content generation without human editing
nodes.grounding_span: I might use writing tools for proofreading, and providing basic structure before editing it with my own flair

nodes.label: AI for campaign planning and delegation
nodes.grounding_span: the tedious part of planning was helped by the AI

nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.grounding_span: Perplexity helps with research on Billboard or industry statistics

nodes.label: AI-generated content quality and validity
nodes.label_negative: AI-written content quality: generic vs personal
nodes.grounding_span: the AI-written content can come out quite generic or stiff

nodes.label: AI for keyword research: low-hanging fruit vs long-tail
nodes.label_negative: AI for keyword research: low-hanging fruit vs long-tail
nodes.grounding_span: the AI's suggestions were quite 'low-hanging fruit', when I wanted more long-tail keywords

nodes.label: AI as professional development tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'm better at training AI than they are

nodes.label: Authenticity of AI-generated content
nodes.label_negative: Human authenticity in content vs AI polish
nodes.grounding_span: the polished videos don't seem to resonate so much with followers

nodes.label: Creative control and originality
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to add my own flair, and make it sound 'personal'

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes we have deadlines to meet

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I'm upskilling in data and technical skills like SEO

nodes.label: Audience engagement and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: LinkedIn boosts posts with more human interaction

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for campaign planning
nodes.grounding_span: It produced a very comprehensive plan, with the effective dates

nodes.label: Confidence in AI for research and rewording
nodes.grounding_span: I found that it was quicker to do it myself

nodes.label: Preference for personal touch in communication
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to add my own flair, and make it sound 'personal'

nodes.label: Strategic upskilling to complement AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'm upskilling in data and technical skills like SEO

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: Through some iteration, I'll see the suggestions ChatGPT makes

nodes.label: Selective delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: It might vary, because social media posts, sales emails, blogs and newsletters have different requirements
